title: Europe’s shelves tell a story — let’s not misread it [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe’s supermarket shelves reflect a highly integrated and resilient Single Market. Current debates risk oversimplifying price differences and misidentifying their causes. Without robust evidence, intervention could disrupt supply chains, reduce choice and innovation, and ultimately undermine the system that delivers value to consumers.
